message: [tests] Fix flaky flight tests (#35513)  Flights tests are failing locally and in CI non-deterministically because we're not disabling async hooks after tests, and GC can clear WeakRefs non-deterministically.  This PR fixes the issue by adding an afterEach to disable installed hooks, and normalizing
[tests] add silent reporter (#35547) Adds silent reporter so you can run tests and only see the failed tests This helps reduce context agents use, if you're inclined to use agents:

smb/client: introduce KUnit test to check search result of smb2_error_map_table  The KUnit test are executed when cifs.ko is loaded. syscall: document Sendfile semantics  syscall.Sendfile behavior differs significantly between operating systems.  Document the platform-specific behavior for the offset argument and partial write reporting on Linux versus BSD-derived systems.  Fixes #64044  Change-Id: I93f740c3e2df911a10bf0884ffab21
